form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start disqualified at Loudeac on April 5 over 2850m. The run before 7th over 2900m at Challans beaten 40m by Kash De Tillard in 6yo race on March 22. Watch for a far better effort this time.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into fifth behind Kalou La Trigale at Vincennes over 2700m in a 6yo gelding race on February 10 at $32. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Six-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track and Amiens. Last start won by 21m as favourite at this track beating Kalie Choum in 6yo race on April 5 at $2.30. No reason he cannot chalk-up the hat-trick.
